title: Battery harness retaining clip missed
summary: Deviation raised because the battery harness was not secured in the required retaining clip.
recommended_action: Re-route the harness through the retaining clip and re-verify before release.

title: Wheel nut torque below SOP threshold
summary: Critical incident opened after the torque pattern was incomplete and the final torque values were below the required threshold.
recommended_action: Hold the unit, re-run the torque sequence, and verify final torque values before release.
